mustPass: The scaffold must support a content-first editorial website with clear surfaces for latest material and subscription.
News and program surfaces must be distinct: one for ongoing publications, one for recurring formats or coverage areas.
The structure must build trust through identifiable editorial information rather than sales-style claims.
Contact and newsletter conversion must both be supported without overwhelming the reading experience.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a local service company with service lists as the core offer.
Do not require ecommerce, booking or pricing flows.
Do not invent awards, reach figures, accreditations or newsroom scale.
Do not make broadcast schedules mandatory when the business may publish on-demand or irregularly.
Do not overuse promotional CTA blocks that interrupt editorial browsing.
